title: LCE Iron Bars
description: Reverts the iron bars model back to that of Legacy Console Edition
body: Changes the weird Java iron bar model to the model from Legacy Console Edition (similar to the glass pane model). Best experienced with WilyIcaro's Legacy4J.![With Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fea9474164ef170937b60403d78767875ceea011.png)
